  "findings": [
    "System failed the standing vacuum decay test",
    "Pressure rose from 327 microns to 1880 microns in 10 minutes",
    "Decay exceeds 500 microns and continues to rise past 1000 microns, indicating a leak in the system"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Pressurize the system with dry nitrogen to locate the leak",
    "Repair the leak at the source",
    "Repeat the evacuation and standing decay test until vacuum holds below 500 microns"
  ],
  "rationale": "The micron level rose from 327 to 1880 microns during a 10-minute isolation test. Because the pressure rose well past 1000 microns and did not stabilize, this indicates a leak in the system rather than simple moisture outgassing (which typically stabilizes below 1000-1500 microns).",
  "references": [
    "EPA Section 608",
    "Industry Standard Evacuation Practices (500 micron hold)"
  ]
}
